subheading: Search papers, analyze trending keywords, and track research areas — all in one place.
noResults: No results found matching your search.
featuresDesc: Not just a search engine — but a platform to help you break through in research competition.
feature1Desc: Search by keyword, author, journal, year. Results sorted by relevance. Simple yet powerful.
feature2Desc: See which keywords are growing, which topics are saturated, compare multiple keywords on the same chart.
feature3Desc: Follow favorite keywords/journals. Get emails when new papers are out — don't miss important research.
feature4Desc: Bookmark great papers, organize by project, tag, and custom reading lists.
feature5Desc: Create trend reports, export CSV or PNG. Use for academics or collaboration proposals.
feature6Desc: Data from OpenAlex — open, free. Unlimited API calls, no paywall.
howToUseDesc: Four steps to gain insight into your research area
step1Desc: Type keyword you want to study — e.g. "LLM", "computer vision"
step2Desc: System draws trend charts, and continuously updates paper lists
step3Desc: Compare keywords, view paper details, discover related topics
step4Desc: Bookmark great papers, follow keywords, receive new paper alerts
ctaSubheading: Free, no credit card required, use it now without registration
footerCredit: Data from OpenAlex · SInt2801 Project · FPT University 2025
